rows.label: qev097802_MSG0001
rows.name:
Hey, you're back! Did you find a
piece of the Lifepoint that contained
the information I was after?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097802_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Wow, this really does look
like medical data. Nice going.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097802_MSG0003
rows.name:
This should at least point us
to the cause of her condition.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097802_MSG0004
rows.name:
If it also lists a treatment, so
much the better— but even just
knowing the cause may help us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097802_MSG0005
rows.name:
It looks like we'll actually be
able to help her get better![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097802_MSG0006
rows.name:
I just wish that were
the end of things...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097802_MSG0007
rows.name:
But, um...it seems the sick Nopon's
lover took off in search of a cure.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097802_MSG0008
rows.name:
All he could really do is bank on
discovering something during his travels.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097802_MSG0009
rows.name:
Guess he didn't expect you to show up with
a cure for their incurable disease...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097802_MSG0010
rows.name:
Anyway, he must still be out there
somewhere, wandering across Mira in vain.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097802_MSG0011
rows.name: Kind of tragic, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097802_MSG0012
rows.name:
I wish we could let him know that there's
hope for his girlfriend to get better.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097802_MSG0013
rows.name:
Plus, I'm sure she'd get better quicker
with him around to give her support.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097802_MSG0014
rows.name:
This is a lot to ask as a
tack-on to my previous huge
and vague request, but, um...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097802_MSG0015
rows.name:
Could you maybe track down that wandering
Nopon and tell him to hurry home?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097802_MSG0016
rows.name:
It's for her health, and
for love! ...So please?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097802_MSG0017
rows.name: Any leads on finding her man?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097802_MSG0018
rows.name:
I know it's not easy to track down someone
who's constantly wandering around.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097802_MSG0019
rows.name:
Still, I assume he's stopped at other
Nopon caravans he's passed, so the
folks there may know something.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev097802_MSG0020
rows.name:
I'll bet if you did a lap of the
caravans and talked to everyone,
someone would have an answer for you.[ST:wait ]
